description_long: A single round donut with a light pink icing sits on a small white plate, accompanied by a brown cup, both placed on a light gray marble tabletop. The donut has a smooth, glossy surface with no visible toppings, and the icing covers the top evenly, leaving the sides and bottom exposed. The plate is simple and white, providing a clean contrast to the pastel pink of the donut. The brown cup, likely ceramic, is small and unadorned, positioned next to the plate. The background features a pale lavender brick wall, adding a soft urban ambiance to the scene. The overall setting suggests a casual, modern café or street-side snack spot.
description: A pink-iced donut on a white plate sits beside a brown cup on a marble tabletop, set against a lavender brick wall. The donut is smooth and glossy, with no visible toppings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pink-iced donut on a white plate and a brown cup on a marble surface, with a lavender brick wall as the backdrop.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the relative positions of the donut, plate, and cup on the marble table, with the wall receding into the background.
description_view_2: Top-down view dominated by the lavender brick wall, with the donut and cup barely visible at the bottom edge.
description_view_3: Oblique side view showing the spatial separation between the wall and the marble tabletop with the donut and cup.
attribute_icing_type: smooth pink sugar glaze, glossy and evenly spread over the top
attribute_placement_location: on a white plate atop a marble tabletop
